description: A customer whose account was suspended for non-payment has paid their overdue invoice and wants their service reactivated immediately.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer's account and confirm its 'suspended' status.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the account and confirms the suspension.

nodes.task_description: Verify in the billing system that the overdue payment has been successfully processed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the account balance is now zero.

nodes.task_description: Manually remove the service suspension from the account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully reactivates the account, restoring service.
